# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
        
      - name: Login to Docker Hub
        uses: docker/login-action@v1
        with:
          username: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}
        
      - name: Build and push Docker image
        run: |
          docker build -t ${GITHUB_ACTOR}/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY} .
          docker tag ${GITHUB_ACTOR}/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}:latest ${GITHUB_ACTOR}/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}@latest
          docker push ${GITHUB_ACTOR}/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}
        
      - name: Deploy to production
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.7.1
        with:
          hostName: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_HOST }}
          userName: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_USERNAME }}
          privateKey: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          script: |
            docker pull ${GITHUB_ACTOR}/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}@latest
            docker stop $(docker ps -aq)
            docker rm $(docker ps -aq)
            docker run --name ${GITHUB_ACTION} -p 8080:80 ${GITHUB_ACTOR}/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}@latest
